Assets from this POI are available in UEFN/Creative

Blitz[]

Pleasant Park is a Named Location in Blitz Royale that was added in Chapter 6: Season 3 to the island Venture. Pleasant Park is a big neighborhood with a gas station and soccer field.

History

History[]

  • C6S3
  • C6S4

Update v36.10[]

June 18th 2025

  • Pleasant Park was added.

June 24th 2025

  • Double-Colored House was replaced by an Elemental Shrine.

Update v37.00[]

August 12th 2025

  • The Elemental Shrine was replaced by an Oathbound house. Autumnal trees appeared around it.

ID
Athena.Location.POI.PleasantPark
Pleasant Park is a Named Location in Fortnite: OG, that returned in Season 1 with the island Athena. Pleasant Park is a big neighborhood with a gas station and soccer field.

History

History[]

  • S1
  • S3
  • S5
  • S6
  • S7
  • S8

Update v33.00[]

December 6th 2024

  • Pleasant Park has returned along with Athena.

Update v34.20[]

March 25th 2025

  • A Vending Machine was added to Pleasant Park.

Update v37.30[]

September 23rd 2025

  • A Birthday Cake was added for Fortnite's 8th Birthday.

Update v37.40[]

October 2nd 2025

  • The soccer pitch was changed into an American football pitch.

Update v39.11[]

December 25th 2025

  • Pleasant Park was covered in snow for Christmas Day.

December 26th 2025

  • The snow melted.

Update v39.30[]

January 22nd 2026

  • The football pitch was upgraded.

Update v39.40[]

Ice Storm

  • Pleasant Park was covered in snow by the Ice King.

Update v39.50[]

February 27th 2026

  • The snow has partially melted.

February 28th 2026

  • The rest of the snow has melted.

Update v40.10[]

April 1st 2026

  • The destroyed house with the tree that fell on its roof was repaired and revamped.

Pleasant Park was a Named Location in Fortnite: Battle Royale, that returned in Chapter 2 Remix with the island Apollo. Pleasant Park was a big neighborhood with a gas station and soccer field.

History

History[]

  • REMIX
  • C6S1

Update v32.00[]

  • Pleasant Park has returned along with Apollo.

Update v32.10[]

  • The soccer field opened up once again.

Update v33.00[]

  • Pleasant Park is no longer accessible.

Pass 'N' Gas

Pleasant Park was a Named Location in Fortnite: Battle Royale, that came back in Chapter 4: Season OG with the island Athena. Pleasant Park was a big neighborhood with a gas station and soccer field.

History

History[]

  • C4SOG

Update v27.00[]

  • Pleasant Park has returned along with Athena, due to Time Travel.
  • November 9th 2023: Quadcrashers can now spawn here.
    • The truck with the Time Machine drove away.

Update v27.11[]

  • November 23rd 2023: The Ballers can now spawn here.
    • Quadcrashers were vaulted.

The Big Bang[]

  • Pleasant Park was sucked into The Black Hole once again.

  • Music

Pleasant Park was a Named Location in Fortnite: Battle Royale that was added in Chapter 2: Season 1 with the island Apollo. Pleasant Park was a big neighborhood with a gas station and soccer field.

History

History[]

  • C2S1
  • C2S2
  • C2S3
  • C2S4
  • C2S5
  • C2S8
  • C3S4

Update v11.00[]

October 15th 2019

  • Pleasant Park was added, following the formation of Apollo.

Update v11.10[]

October 29th 2019

  • Halloween decorations were added for the Fortnitemares 2019 Event.

November 5th 2019

  • The halloween decorations were removed as the Fortnitemares 2019 Event ended.

Update v11.21[]

December 7th 2019

  • Multiple posters have appeared around Pleasant Park, having the same information as the Risky Reels movie screen of Star Wars.

Update v11.30[]

December 15th 2019

  • All posters about the Star Wars event have been taken down.

Update v11.31[]

December 25th 2019

  • Pleasant Park was covered in snow.

January 9th 2020

  • The snow melted.

Update v12.40[]

April 15th 2020

  • No Sweat Insurance signs appeared all over Pleasant Park.

April 17th 2020

  • Multiple posters related to music, a planet and Sweaty Sands appeared around Salty Springs.

Update v12.41[]

April 21st 2020

  • Posters about Travis Scott's Astronomical were updated, showing the time and dates of the event.

Update v12.50[]

April 29th 2020

  • All posters about Travis Scott's Astronomical have been taken down.

Update v13.30[]

July 21st 2020

  • Most of the cars have disappeared due to the No Sweat Insurance coverage.
  • The Gas Station was upgraded into a much larger gas station.

Update v13.40[]

August 5th 2020

  • Cars can now spawn here.

Update v14.00[]

August 27th 2020

  • Pleasant Park was turned into Doom's Domain by Doctor Doom.

Update v15.00[]

December 2nd 2020

  • Doom's Domain became Pleasant Park.

Update v18.00[]

September 13th 2021

  • Charlotte now spawns here as a Character.

The End[]

December 4th 2021

  • Pleasant Park turned upside down during the flipping of the island.

Fracture[]

December 3rd 2022

  • Pleasant Park was destroyed following the explosion of Reality Zero.

Chapter 1[]

This article is about a location that has been removed from the map.

Pleasant Park was a Named Location in Fortnite: Battle Royale that was added in Pre-Season with the island Athena. Pleasant Park was a big neighborhood with a gas station and soccer field.

History

History[]

  • S0
  • S2
  • S3
  • S5
  • S6
  • S7
  • S8
  • S9
  • SX

Update v1.6[]

September 12th 2017

  • Pleasant Park was added as a part of the first version of the Battle Royale map.

Update v1.11[]

December 13th 2017

  • The gazebo was replaced by a Christmas tree.

Update v2.2.0[]

January 18th 2018

  • The Christmas tree was removed.

Update v3.40[]

March 28th 2018

  • Vending Machines were added to Pleasant Park.

Update v5.10[]

July 24th 2018

  • A Birthday Cake was added for Fortnite's 1st Birthday.

Update v5.20[]

August 7th 2018

  • The Birthday Cake was removed as Fortnite's 1st Birthday ended.

Update v5.40[]

September 6th 2018

  • The soccer pitch was changed into an American football pitch.

Update v6.00[]

September 27th 2018

  • The American football pitch was changed back into a soccer pitch.

Update v6.20[]

October 24th 2018

  • Halloween decorations were added for the Fortnitemares 2018 Event.

Update v6.21[]

November 3rd 2018

  • The halloween decorations were removed as the Fortnitemares 2018 Event ended.

November 6th 2018

  • The soccer field was changed into an American football field. This was due to an NFL sponsorship with Epic Games.

Update v6.30[]

November 14th 2018

  • The food trucks are now at Pleasant Park.

November 18th 2018

  • The food trucks left.

Update v7.00[]

December 6th 2018

  • Christmas Decorations were added.

Update v7.10[]

December 18th 2018

  • A Christmas Tree was added for the 14 Days of Fortnite event.

December 25th 2018

  • Pleasant Park was covered in snow for Christmas Day.

December 26th 2018

  • The snow disappeared.

January 2nd 2019

  • All decorations were removed as 14 Days of Fortnite ended.

January 8th 2019

  • The Christmas Tree returned as 14 Days of Fortnite was brought back for 7 more days.

Update v7.20[]

January 15th 2019

  • The Christmas Tree was removed as 14 Days of Fortnite ended once again.

Ice Storm Event[]

January 19th 2019

  • Pleasant Park was covered in snow.

Update v7.30[]

January 29th 2019

  • A stage is being set up at Pleasant Park where the Football Field is.

January 30th 2019

  • Some speakers and stages were set up at Pleasant Park.

February 1st 2019

  • The snow in Pleasant Park melted.
  • The stage at Pleasant Park was fully set up, complete with lights and singing equipment.

February 2nd 2019

  • Marshmello performed a 10 minute-long concert, with music, lights, holograms and more at Pleasant Park.

February 3rd 2019

  • The stage at Pleasant Park is now gone.

February 5th 2019

  • The field was changed, with an NFL logo in the middle and the New England Patriots and the Los Angeles Rams markings on the side. This is to celebrate Super Bowl LIII.

February 6th 2019

  • The Pleasant Park football field was changed back to normal.

Update v8.00[]

February 28th 2019

  • The destroyed house with the tree that fell on its roof was repaired and revamped.

Update v8.30[]

April 10th 2019

  • A Reboot Van was added to Pleasant Park.

Update v8.40[]

April 17th 2019

  • Two secret bunkers were added underneath the blue house and the smallest house.

Update v9.21[]

June 16th 2019

  • The Modern House was destroyed by The Devourer.

Update v9.41[]

July 25th 2019

  • A Birthday Cake was added for Fortnite's 2nd Birthday.

July 31st 2019

  • The Birthday Cake was removed as Fortnite's 2nd Birthday ended.

Update v10.20[]

September 3rd 2019

  • A red balloon has appeared.

September 9th 2019

  • The red balloon has been removed.

The End[]

October 13th 2019

  • Pleasant Park was sucked into The Black Hole.
